ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monitoring_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the station (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the station location */,
  "equipment_model" TEXT /* Model number of the monitoring equipment */,
  "equipment_description" TEXT /* Description of the monitoring equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_quality_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the monitoring station that collected the data */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the data collection */,
  "data_time" TEXT /* Time of the data collection */,
  "clean_mid" REAL /* Clean mid measurement (e.g., concentration of a specific pollutant) */,
  "cum_volume" REAL /* Cumulative volume of pollutants measured */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the station is currently operational */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Ambient temperature during data collection */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity during data collection */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure during data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality check */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Data ID that was checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was performed */,
  "check_result" TEXT /* Result of the quality check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the quality check */,
  "checked_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who performed the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES air_quality_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Data ID associated with the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high pollution level, station offline) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, moderate, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES air_quality_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data upload */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring station that uploaded the data */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date of the upload */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who uploaded the data */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the uploaded data file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the uploaded data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the uploaded data file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring station */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date of the status entry */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the status */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_status_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of feedback submission */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the user regarding the system */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the logged-in user */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the session */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_tokens" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API token */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID associated with the API token */,
  "token" TEXT /* API token for data access */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the API token expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_tokens_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of data visualization (e.g., chart, graph, map) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Data ID associated with the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES air_quality_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
